title: What Integrity Actually Means for a Man of God
caption:
Integrity got turned into a performance of never being wrong. That's not the Word, that's PR.

A man of God fails plenty. What makes him whole isn't a clean record, it's an honest one. Integrity comes from the same root as integer: a whole number, not split into parts.

So ask the real question. Are you the same guy in the group chat and at church? Do you know what you'd do in the room with no witnesses? And when you split anyway, do you bring it into the light yourself, or wait to be caught?

"Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16

Character is who you are when the audience leaves. Integrity isn't never splitting. It's refusing to stay split.

Save this and check which version of you shows up where.

#faith #integrity #christianmen #character #godlymen #manofgod #james #scripture #christianity
